pi_items.source: task description and verifier.py logic explicitly checking for 'Holdings' directory and file
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which define and check this exact path
setup_task.sh which pre-populates the buyportfolio.csv with AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA
setup_task.sh which pre-populates the default watchlist with AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA, meaning GOOGL and AMZN are not in the portfolio
verifier.py expects exactly 3 stocks in the portfolio to grant bonus points

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new JStock watchlist named 'Holdings' containing only the stocks present in 'My Portfolio' (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA), while excluding others (GOOGL, AMZN). The data is synthetically generated during the environment setup. The expected output file path is '/home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/watchlist/Holdings/realtimestock.csv'. All metadata parameters regarding required stocks, forbidden stocks, and output paths have been verified against the setup and verification scripts.
